subject: fix(quality): address code audit findings across 10 files
body:
Anti-patterns fixed:
- App.jsx: Keyboard listener uses useRef for latest values, registered
  once instead of re-registering on every state change (7+ dep churn)
- designStorage.js: Cache IDB connection with auto-reconnect on close,
  eliminates opening a new connection per CRUD operation
- Toast.jsx: Toast ID wraps at MAX_SAFE_INTEGER to prevent overflow
  in long sessions

Latent bugs fixed:
- useFocusTrap.js: try/catch around focus restore on unmount (element
  may have been removed from DOM)
- useHistory.js: deepEqual has MAX_DEPTH=20 guard to prevent stack
  overflow on corrupted/circular state
- ContextBar.jsx: Memoized page state lookups via PageDots component,
  avoids calling getPageState() for every page on every render
- SaveLoadModal.jsx: activeRef guard prevents stale setDesigns() call
  if modal closes while IDB query is in-flight

Resilience improvements:
- ExportButtons.jsx: Multi-platform export catches per-platform errors,
  exports successful ones in ZIP, warns user which platforms failed
- layouts.js: Documented gradient stop magic numbers with empirical
  tuning rationale (anti-banding for canvas export)
- DebugPill.jsx: Clipboard copy uses ClipboardItem Blob API before
  falling back to deprecated execCommand

Tags: quality, performance, reliability, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
